jobPostingInfo.title: Student, Associate Business & Systems Analyst (Fall 2026)
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
Our student and new graduate programs offer a chance to explore Sun Life from the inside. You’ll make a difference in the lives of our customers and communities, while building the skills and experience that allow you to grow in a meaningful and rewarding way.

Job Description:

Reporting to the Manager, Business & Systems Analysis Chapter, the Associate Business & Systems Analyst can mix analysis skills, a strong technical aptitude, communication, and leadership to help build exceptional solutions.

This opportunity is available to students with a graduation date of December 2026 or later.

Term: September 8th 2026 to December 18th 2026 (4 months)

What will you do?

  • Analyze and define user requirements and translate them into system requirements/user stories.
  • Review and provide comments to business and technical documents.
  • Partner with peers, business partners, vendors, leaders, and IT teams to help as needed throughout the project life cycle to ensure the solutions meet the expectations of our business partners and clients.
  • Build and keep successful relationships with members of the team and our business partners.
  • Join in continuous improvement initiatives to improve agility and delight our clients.
  • Contribute/grow our Business & Systems Analysis Practice.

What do you need to succeed?

  • A strong communicator who listens and picks up on the spoken and unspoken words to excel at delivering, understanding, and interpreting messages through verbal discussions and in writing.
  • An analytical thinker with an aptitude for problem-solving and interpreting information who can present it clearly and simply.
  • A collaborative team member who constantly looks for ways to improve the client experience, our team, and our processes.
  • An organized facilitator with the ability to guide and keep a group on track, ensure everyone is heard, while moving discussions toward the intended goals and decisions
  • Ideally, we’ll also get somebody with one or more of the following:
    • Solid working knowledge of Microsoft products (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Visio);
    • A technical aptitude and curiosity;
    • Completed equivalent courses or work term experience in Business Analysis

What is in it for you?

  • A friendly, collaborative, and inclusive culture where you’re an innovator and trusted partner
  • An environment of continuous learning and improvement
  • Opportunities to grow your skills through on the job coaching and formal training.
  • To be part of an innovative culture where continuous improvement is valued, rewarded, and embedded in what we do.
  • We’re honoured to be recognized as a 2022 Best Workplaces in Canada by Great Place to Work® Canada

The Base Pay range is for the primary location for which the job is posted for. The Base Pay which you will be considered for will vary depending on the Campus program you are selected for.

Eligible Sun Life employees for various Campus Graduate programs will also participate in various incentive plans, payment under which is discretionary and subject to individual and company performance

Diversity and inclusion have always been at the core of our values at Sun Life. A diverse workforce with wide perspectives and creative ideas benefits our Clients, the communities where we operate and all of us as colleagues. We welcome applications from qualified individuals from all backgrounds.

Persons with disabilities who need accommodation in the application process, or those needing job postings in an alternative format, may e-mail a request to thebrightside@sunlife.com.

We are proud to be a hybrid organization that offers our employees the choice and flexibility to work from both the office and virtually based on the needs of the business, our Clients and you! Several flexible work options are available and can be discussed throughout the selection process depending on the role requirements and individual needs.

We may use artificial intelligence to support candidate sourcing, screening, interview scheduling.

We thank all applicants for showing an interest in this position. Only those selected for an interview will be contacted.

Job Category:

Temporary Employee

Posting End Date:

22/05/2026
